items.title_en: Kinship: descent type: Absence of significant class distinctions among freemen (slavery is treated in EA070), ignoring variations in individual repute achieved through skill, valor, piety, or wisdom
items.title_ja: 親族：下降型：自由民間の階級区別の欠如
items.desc_ja: 自由民間に有意な階級区別がなく、個人的評判や能力による変異のみが認識される下降血統体系。

items.title_en: Kinship: descent type: Absence of significant class distinctions among freemen (slavery is treated in EA070), ignoring variations in individual repute achieved through skill, valor, piety, or wisdom
items.title_ja: 親族制度：階級区別の欠如
items.desc_ja: 自由民間に有意な階級区別がない親族の下降型システム。個人の技能、勇敢さ、敬虔さ、知恵による評判の変動は無視される。

items.title_en: Kinship: descent type: Dual stratification into a hereditary aristocracy and a lower class of ordinary commoners or freemen, where traditionally ascribed noble status is at least as decisive as control over scarce resources
items.title_ja: 親族制度：二元的階級化（貴族と平民）
items.desc_ja: 世襲的貴族と一般平民への二元的階級分化制度。伝統的な身分が資源支配と同等以上に重要。
